name: Novikova Elena Viktorovna
description: Novikova Elena Viktorovna is a minor, and later the main character of the animated series "Heroes of Envell". The teacher of Art, Phil, Kira, Vic and Ilya. Elena Viktorovna replaced Maria Stepanovna as a geography teacher, and after that, the place of the fifth player in the team of "Heroes of Envell".
creator: qweirv
